project.name: Knowledge Core 产品原型
project.designRead: knowledge management app / developers / professional / information-dense / decorative clutter

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Light mode, neutral surfaces, brand accent #4b3fe3, Inter + system sans, 8px card radius, 14px body baseline, quiet professional aesthetic

continuityAnchors.layout: sidebar-left + main-content-right, sidebar with category tree and tags, main area with search bar + note grid/list
continuityAnchors.shell: left sidebar 240px fixed, top bar with search and actions, main scrollable content area

continuityAnchors.layout: sidebar-left + main-content, article reader view with metadata header and back navigation
continuityAnchors.shell: same sidebar, main area shows rendered markdown with frontmatter metadata panel

continuityAnchors.layout: centered modal-style page with step indicator, file upload zone, AI analysis preview
continuityAnchors.shell: clean centered panel with step progress, drag-drop upload area, analysis results preview

continuityAnchors.layout: sidebar-left + main-content, search bar with filters, result cards with highlighted matches
continuityAnchors.shell: same sidebar, main area with search bar, tag/date filters, and search result list
